prestazioni: M113 E43 4.3L V8 engine: Full forged internals upgrade with Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance to handle 600+ HP reliably under forced induction.

Precision Turbo & Engine PT6766 CEA turbocharger (67mm inducer, 66mm exducer) with a custom 3.5" stainless steel turbo manifold by SMS Engineering, paired with a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate and a custom 4" downpipe with Vibrant 1799 resonated mufflers for optimized spool and backpressure management.

Bosch Motorsport 0280158862 high-flow fuel injectors (850cc/min) with a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, controlled via a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with custom M113-specific maps, including individual cylinder trimming and launch control for consistent 0-60 mph in 3.8 seconds.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 W210 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders (30mm wider front, 40mm wider rear) and aggressive front canards from Seibon Carbon, paired with a custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with gloss black accents on the grille and mirror caps.

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (W210-specific valving) with custom 20mm front and 25mm rear lowering springs, paired with H&R 27mm front and 24mm rear anti-roll bars for reduced body roll and improved turn-in response.

BBS LM-R 9.5x18" ET25 front and 10.5x18" ET35 rear wheels with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/35/18 front, 285/30/18 rear), wrapped in custom red-stitched Alcantara door cards and Recaro SRD-E full bucket seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses for track-ready ergonomics.
